root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate, '!operate_date_1!' as datefrom, '!operate_date_2!' as dateto, sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_cnt_m_coop WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '000048' ) )

r_vjr_share_statment_by_memnocs_nest.sql: select operate_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(operate_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as operate_tdate, seq_no , share_value , share_stock , period from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where membership_no = {0} and operate_date between {1} and {2} order by operate_date ,seq_no
